subject: Add competitive leaderboard prompt to Campaign page
description:
From stretch.md: The page dynamically injects "Help [organizer] climb the leaderboard, donate today!" and shows campaign rank.

Implementation:
- Pull organizer's leaderboard rank from community.json
- Render a small card below the donate button or in the story column: "Help Maya reach #1 - currently #2 on the leaderboard"
- Link to /community for full leaderboard
- Creates cross-page connectivity and competitive altruism

Small scope - a conditional card in CampaignPage.jsx using existing community data.

changes: Added leaderboard prompt card in donate panel - shows organizer rank and links to /community
Only renders when rank > 1 (no prompt for #1 organizer)
